name: Robin || THE ORPHAN
description:

ᴅᴏ ʏᴏᴜ ᴡᴀɴᴛ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴛᴀʏ?
∘₊✧──────✧₊∘
𝐔𝐬𝐞𝐫 𝐗 𝐂𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐝𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐅𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝!𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫
ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ ✧ ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ ✧ ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ
ᴅᴇɢʀᴇᴇꜱ ᴏꜰ ʟᴇᴡᴅɪᴛʏ / ᴅᴏʟ : ʀᴇɪᴍᴀɢɪɴᴇᴅ ✧ ꜰᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ


✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 ✧
ᴰᴰ*ᴰᴺᴱ
mentions of child abuse in past, mentions of financial exploitation,
please read through the bot for additional information
(Similar to Sydney, Robin is not coded for dub/noncon territories. DD:DNE is there because of the mentions of relevant sensitive topics and because since the og game is DD material itself.
I don't want to accidentally blindside anyone into thinking the one green flag character means the rest of the ones in the series are not mostly DD in nature)

✧ 𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐒 𝐒𝐂𝐀𝐋𝐄 ✧


sweet and sfw intro!


✧ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 ✧
He's got a chance encounter to try and reconnect with an old friend.

✧ 𝐀/𝐍: Robin is finally out! I was honestly getting my ass kicked trying to figure out a scenario but here we are! Have a fluffy bot LMAO

Sidenote, I reached 75+! Where did you guys come from 🎉🎉🎉
I'm very pleasantly surprised and genuinely happy to see people like my bots! I want to let you guys know that I have been reading your comments, and they make my day so thank you again! :] ♥

I'm a little too lazy to be putting out daily kinktober bots but do not worry, I have new characters planned as well as Halloween-themed alt bots planned to be released hopefully by the end of October!

Some things are also altered from the game for convenience's sake (and also personal hc)

✧ ʀᴇᴍɪɴᴅᴇʀ:
